loop_intake.description: Validates proposed loop documents and places them in the correct workflow directory.

approval.description: Routes approval-required loops to humans before they become pending work.

dispatch_monitor.description: Finds canonical pending loops and dispatches Codex when no active lock exists.

review_intake.description: Starts review when Codex emits a waiting-review signal.

verdict_router.description: Routes reviewed loops based on reviewer verdict.
